meaning: [军] Technical Inspection,技术检查 [军] Thermal Imager,热成像 美国德州仪器公司,生产芯片及计算机产品 symb [化]钛 (titanium) <音>全音阶的第7音
examples: TI has seen its shares suffer because of a flight of capital to telecom and Internet-related businesses.
With his ti leaf lei and a boar's tusk necklace, he looked like he'd stepped off the pages of National Geographic magazine.
TI is aware of the index's shortcomings.
Excluding one-time charges and the soon-to-be history memory business, TI posted a solid 47% gross margin.
So the executives at TI decided to reinvent the company as a nearly pure DSP play.
